race.comment: CLASSIC GEM (1) narrowly on top. She ran very well first up behind a top filly in Getta Good Feeling, ratting home home 1600m to grab second. This looks easier and she'll be fitter going slightly up in trip which will suit. SAVITRI (6) is a progressive type who won in strong time when last seen at Caulfield Heath over 1500m. She gets 2.5kg off the topweight and looks set to appreciate extra ground here. JUST KICK (8) also comes through the Getta Good Feeling race, working home well for a narrow fourth. She can improve into this. GRAND OMAHA (7) has good early speed and came away to win well at Caulfield Heath last time out against older horses. She'll roll forward here and take catching. MORGANA (4) has each way claims, also wary of the unbeaten PALTROW MISS (5).
